segments.text: Hear the word of the Lord, people of Israel, for the Lord has an accusation against the inhabitants of the land! {
There is no faithfulness, no loyalty, and no knowledge of God in the land.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Instead there is only cursing, lying, murdering, stealing, and adultery. They commit violence, and bloodshed follows bloodshed.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: As a result the land dries up,  and everyone who lives there is wasting away, along with the wild animals and the birds of the sky and the fish of the sea—they are all dying.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: But no one should accuse or blame anyone else. My quarrel is with you the priests—you are the ones responsible.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Consequently you will stumble in daylight, and the prophet will stumble together with you in the night, and I will destroy your mother.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: My people are dying because they don't know me. Because you have refused to know me, I refuse to accept you as my priests. You have forgotten my teachings, so I will forget your children.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The more there were of them,  the more they sinned against me, so I will change their glory into shame.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They feed on the sin of my people, greedy for their iniquity.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: So it will be for the people like the priests: I will punish them for what they have done, repaying them for their actions.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They will eat, but they will not be satisfied; they will engage in prostitution,  but they will not prosper because they have given up on the Lord to go and prostitute themselves to other gods.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They destroy their minds with old wine and new wine.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: My people consult their wooden idols and their divining rods give them answers, for a spirit of prostitution makes them go astray. Prostituting themselves, they have deserted their God.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They offer sacrifices on the tops of mountains; they burn incense in the hills under the oak, poplar, and terebinth trees where the shade is pleasant. That's the reason why your daughters practice prostitution and your daughters-in-law commit adultery.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: I will not punish your daughters when they practice prostitution, nor your daughters-in-law when they commit adultery, because you men visit whores and sacrifice with temple prostitutes. A people who lack understanding end up in disaster.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Though you, Israel, have become a prostitute, may Judah not offend in the same way and not enter Gilgal, nor go up to Beth-aven,  nor swear saying, ‘The Lord lives.’
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For Israel is as stubborn as a stubborn cow. Should the Lord then take care of them like a lamb in a wide pasture?
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Ephraim is bewitched by idols, so leave him alone!
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Once the leaders finish drinking, they go off and find prostitutes to sleep with. They love their shameful acts more than honor.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: A wind will carry them away; they will be ashamed of their pagan worship.
segments.speaker: God
